prompt: A highly realistic vertical smartphone screenshot of a Chinese livestream app showing a cozy college dorm room streamer scene. The interface should look like a real iPhone screen capture with status bar at the top, including Chinese carrier text, time 9:16, and battery around 67%. In the upper left, show a circular cartoon avatar and a livestream info badge with the streamer name "叮当猫", age "18岁", and the line "直播中 | 10.2万人在看". Add small app icons in the upper right for chat/menu and close. The main scene is a young female college student sitting at a desk, facing the phone camera and waving with one hand. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has shoulder-length dark hair and wears large black-and-pink over-ear gaming headphones and a white hoodie with a small cute cat illustration on the chest. She is livestreaming from a tidy, warmly lit dorm bedroom. Behind her is a light-colored loft bed with a safety rail and cream bedding printed with bears and stars, plus a ladder with colorful rungs in orange, green, and blue. Under and beside the loft bed are shelves and a wardrobe area with hanging clothes in pale tones and one bright yellow hoodie. The shelves contain upright books, small plush toys, bottles, and personal items. A ring light is visible on the right edge of the frame. On the desk in front of her, place a smartphone in a clamp stand, a black desktop microphone with a subtle red accent on a mini tripod, open notebooks and papers, stacked textbooks, cosmetics including lipstick and brushes, a clear water bottle, a small black rectangular box, and warm fairy lights scattered across the tabletop. The lighting should feel soft, domestic, and inviting, with realistic indoor shadows and a slight phone-camera look. Overlay exactly 7 floating live chat comments stacked on the lower left in dark translucent rounded boxes with cyan name tags. The comments read, from top to bottom: "弹幕： 主播好可爱！", "弹幕： 叮当猫加油！", "弹幕： 10万+人了！🎉", "弹幕猫： 我也在这个大学", "弹幕： 求同款耳机", "弹幕： 支持主播，爱你💕", "弹幕： 欢迎新人！". At the bottom, include a dark comment input bar with placeholder text "说点什么..." and a row of livestream action icons. On the lower right, add a vertical like area with the label "点赞", a red count bubble showing "9.8万", and a large pink heart button. Overall style: photorealistic Chinese social media livestream screenshot, believable app UI, detailed dorm environment, cute youthful campus streamer aesthetic, natural composition, crisp text rendering, no extra panels.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度逼真的竖屏智能手机截图，展示了中国直播 App 中温馨的大学宿舍直播场景。界面应呈现为真实的 iPhone 屏幕截图效果，顶部包含状态栏，显示中国运营商文字、时间 9:16 以及约 67% 的电量。左上角显示一个圆形卡通头像和一个直播信息徽章，包含主播名“叮当猫”、年龄“18岁”以及“直播中 | 10.2万人在看”的字样。右上角添加用于聊天、菜单和关闭的小图标。主体场景为一位年轻的女大学生坐在书桌前，面向手机摄像头挥手。她的面部被一个柔和的矩形模糊块刻意遮挡。她留着齐肩深色短发，戴着大号黑粉色头戴式游戏耳机，身穿一件胸前印有可爱小猫插画的白色连帽衫。她正在整洁、灯光温暖的宿舍卧室中直播。她身后是一张浅色的高架床，配有安全护栏和印有小熊与星星图案的奶油色床上用品，以及带有橙色、绿色和蓝色横档的梯子。高架床下方和侧面是架子和衣柜区，挂着浅色调的衣服和一件亮黄色连帽衫。架子上摆放着竖放的书籍、小型毛绒玩具、瓶子和个人物品。画面右边缘可见一个环形补光灯。她面前的书桌上放置着：夹在支架上的智能手机、一个带有微弱红色点缀并安装在迷你三脚架上的黑色桌面麦克风、打开的笔记本和纸张、堆叠的教科书、包括口红和化妆刷在内的化妆品、一个透明水瓶、一个小黑色长方形盒子，以及散落在桌面上的暖色调串灯。光线应感觉柔和、居家且具有吸引力，带有真实的室内阴影和轻微的手机拍摄质感。在左下角叠加 7 条浮动实时聊天评论，采用深色半透明圆角框，并带有青色名称标签。评论从上到下依次为：“弹幕： 主播好可爱！”，“弹幕： 叮当猫加油！”，“弹幕： 10万+人了！🎉”，“弹幕猫： 我也在这个大学”，“弹幕： 求同款耳机”，“弹幕： 支持主播，爱你💕”，“弹幕： 欢迎新人！”。底部包含一个深色评论输入栏，占位符文字为“说点什么...”，以及一行直播操作图标。右下角添加一个垂直点赞区域，带有“点赞”标签、显示“9.8万”的红色计数气泡以及一个巨大的粉色爱心按钮。整体风格：照片级逼真的中国社交媒体直播截图，可信的 App UI，细节丰富的宿舍环境，可爱的年轻校园主播美学，自然构图，清晰的文字渲染，无多余面板。

breakdown.creativeCore: 中国宿舍直播截图：该提示词可生成一张照片级逼真的手机直播 App 截图，展示一位女大学生在宿舍进行直播的场景，适用于社交媒体 UI 模型和真实的 AI 生活方式场景。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: App Store 截图、产品概念、移动工具界面
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 73；构图: vertical；风格: realistic, photorealistic；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明

[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
